treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Injected along the circumference of the esophagogastric junction

treatment_information.specific_treatment: Methotrexate, fluorouracil, cisplatin, doxorubicin, etoposide, and paclitaxel
treatment_information.treatment_response: Shrank the tumor, enabling radical surgery

treatment_information.specific_treatment: Total gastrectomy, splenectomy, lymphadenectomy, resection of the major omentum, partial pancreatectomy, and esophagectomy with esophagojejunostomy
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient did well, accommodated completely to new anatomy, and remained free of symptoms

treatment_timeline.event: Botulinum toxin injected along the circumference of the esophagogastric junction
Preoperative chemotherapy (methotrexate, fluorouracil, cisplatin, doxorubicin, etoposide, and paclitaxel) administered
Radical surgery performed (total gastrectomy, splenectomy, lymphadenectomy, resection of the major omentum, partial pancreatectomy, and esophagectomy with esophagojejunostomy)

patient_outcome.final_status: Free of symptoms, accommodated completely to new anatomy
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up of 18 years, free of tumor
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Good, patient has been free of symptoms and will soon get a degree in physical metallurgy
